product.name: JJL Acrylic Cutting Board with Counter Lip, 16 x 12.5 Inches, Food-Grade & Anti-Slip, Clear, with Juice Groove – Perfect for Cutting Food with Juice, Ideal Choice for Kitchen Countertop Décor
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: The transparent, sleek acrylic cutting board with a counter lip maintains countertop beauty. It is lightweight, practical, mold- and rust-free. Easy to clean, it's perfect for cooked food
SAFE MATERIAL: Made from BPA-free food-grade acrylic. Note: Not heat-resistant beyond 140℉ and cannot be washed in the dishwasher
VERSATILE USE: Besides being decorative, this board is great for cutting bread, fruits, vegetables, meat, and more. It also serves as children's plates, dough mats, pastry mats, etc.

USER-FRIENDLY: With a smooth, flat surface, rounded edges, and manual polishing, this cutting board ensures user safety. It features 8 non-slip silicone dots for stability and a unique lip design for a perfect fit
UNCONDITIONAL SATISFACTION: We provide worry-free return and exchange services to ensure a worry-free purchase. It's perfect for family and friends who love cooking
